workLog.action: Discovered PR #1735 scenarios fail every run because eval-prompt-change.py:207 used exact-string compare against canonical verbs (IDENTIFY/ROUTE/PRODUCE) that no agent emits
workLog.evidence: PR #1741 prototype eval runs across security/orchestrator/implementer scenarios all returned before=0%/after=0% (104 API calls, ~364K tokens, ~$3 wasted). Raw artifacts were transient and not committed; result counts are reproducible via scripts/eval/eval-prompt-change.py against PR #1741.

workLog.action: Filed issue #1755 documenting root cause, evidence, and fix scope

Updated scripts/eval/eval-prompt-change.py to use controlled-vocab verdicts: added verdict_options optional field, _verdict_options() helper with [expected, OTHER] default, judge_scenario() now injects allowed labels into user message, check_scenario_pass() does case-insensitive exact match on canonical labels, load_scenarios() validates verdict_options shape and consistency
Updated 8 scenario files in tests/evals/ to declare verdict_options matching each agent's action vocabulary
Added unit tests in tests/eval/test_eval_prompt_change.py covering check_scenario_pass (8 cases), _verdict_options (4 cases), load_scenarios validation (6 cases), shipped scenario integrity (2 cases)
Validated rubric end-to-end by running baseline-vs-baseline evals on all 8 agents
workLog.evidence: Baseline-vs-baseline runs on all 8 agents: critic gate PASS (80%->100%); 7 others FAIL but produce real signal (verdict mismatches and reason-substring misses) where pre-fix had 0% across the board. Raw run artifacts were transient and not committed; per-agent result table summarized in the PR #1756 Honesty notes section.

workLog.action: Documented residual scenario-content issues for follow-up issue (out of rubric-fix scope): adr-generator over-clarifies, implementer over-blocks demanding project docs, expected_reason_contains keywords often miss agent natural phrasing
workLog.evidence: PR description and follow-up issue (filed separately)

nextSteps: File follow-up issue: scenario content tuning (verdict choice review per agent + expected_reason_contains keyword updates)
PR #1741 / PR #1742 prototype evals can now run against fixed rubric to give real parity signal
Implementer agent calibration: investigate why baseline always emits BLOCKED demanding project docs even when scenario provides clear requirements
